creator: matusita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
VMware is going to released VMware Workstation 6 (current stage
	is 'beta 3', and beta test is widely available who interested.).
	I'd like to update ports for VMware Tools already in FreeBSD ports.

	Since there are ports for VMware Workstation 5, so as usual,
	here's a repocopy request.

Fix: 

Recopy following three ports:

        ports/emulators/linux-vmware-toolbox5
		-> ports/emulators/linux-vmware-toolbox6
	ports/emulators/vmware-guestd5
		-> ports/emulators/vmware-guestd6
	ports/emulators/vmware-tools5
		-> ports/emulators/vmware-tools6
How-To-Repeat: 
	% cd /usr/ports/emulators/vmware-guestd6
	cd: no such file or directory: /usr/ports/emulators/vmware-guestd6
	%
